script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== ts ==='; date -u +%FT%TZ
echo '=== kaye bot data dirs ==='
ls -ld /home/kaye/.*bot* 2>/dev/null
ls -ld /home/kaye/.*kaye* 2>/dev/null
ls -ld /home/kaye/.*kayeai* 2>/dev/null
echo '=== kaye services + uptime ==='
for svc in kaye-bot kaye-responder; do
  pid=$(systemctl show ${svc}.service -p MainPID --value 2>/dev/null)
  uptime=$([ -n "$pid" ] && [ "$pid" != 0 ] && ps -o etimes= -p "$pid" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
  state=$(systemctl is-active ${svc}.service 2>&1)
  printf '  %-22s state=%s pid=%s uptime_s=%s\n' "$svc" "$state" "$pid" "$uptime"
done
echo '=== kaye inbound activity (last 5) ==='
for f in /home/kaye/.kaye-bot/activities.jsonl /home/kaye/.kayeai-bot/activities.jsonl /home/kaye/.kaye-agent-bot/activities.jsonl; do
  if [ -f "$f" ]; then
    echo "--- $f (last 5 inbound) ---"
    tail -5 "$f" 2>&1 | python3 -c 'import sys,json
for line in sys.stdin:
  try:
    a=json.loads(line); b=json.loads(a.get("body","{}"))
    print(a.get("ts","?"), "|", ((b.get("from") or {}).get("name","?")), "|", (b.get("text","") or "")[:70].replace(chr(10)," "))
  except Exception as e: print("err", e)' 2>&1
  fi
done
echo '=== kaye outbound (last 5) ==='
for f in /home/kaye/.kaye-bot/outbound.jsonl /home/kaye/.kayeai-bot/outbound.jsonl /home/kaye/.kaye-agent-bot/outbound.jsonl; do
  if [ -f "$f" ]; then
    echo "--- $f (last 5 outbound) ---"
    tail -5 "$f" 2>&1 | python3 -c 'import sys,json
for line in sys.stdin:
  try:
    o=json.loads(line); print(o.get("ts","?"), "|", (o.get("text","") or "")[:70].replace(chr(10)," "))
  except Exception as e: print("err", e)' 2>&1
  fi
done
echo '=== kaye responder err log tail ==='
for f in /home/kaye/.kaye-bot/responder-errors.log /home/kaye/.kayeai-bot/responder-errors.log; do
  if [ -f "$f" ]; then echo "--- $f ---"; tail -15 "$f"; fi
done
echo '=== kaye .claude state + test claude as kaye ==='
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home/kaye/.claude /home/kaye/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
runuser -u kaye -- bash -c 'echo "Answer with one word: hello" | timeout 60 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --dangerously-skip-permissions --append-system-prompt "You are a test bot." 2>&1' | head -10
echo '===END==='
